---
description: "Run a fast brand UI audit for hierarchy, contrast, spacing, and mobile responsiveness on CJ NET screens."
name: "Brand UI Audit Pass"
argument-hint: "Pages or files to audit, plus any priority concerns"
agent: "Brand UI Refactor"
tools: [read, search]
---
Audit the requested UI surfaces using the CJ NET yellow/red brand system.

## What To Check
- Visual hierarchy: primary task clarity, heading structure, and CTA prominence
- Color usage: yellow only for primary actions/highlights, red only for warnings/destructive actions
- Accessibility: WCAG AA contrast for text and interactive states
- Spacing rhythm: 8px scale consistency, tap-target comfort on mobile
- Component consistency: cards, buttons, borders, radius, and shadows

## Project Constraints
- Mobile-first layout
- No visual overengineering
- Clean and professional tone
- Distinctive brand feel without palette abuse

## Output Format
1. Top 5 issues by severity
2. File-level fixes with exact class or token recommendations
3. Quick wins (can be done in under 30 minutes)
4. Follow-up improvements (larger refactor items)
5. Three palette-safe variation ideas if the page would benefit from redesign exploration
